release_note: Sanitized archival alignment report retained for reviewer reference; generated task outputs and non-core experiment bundles are not distributed in this compact release.

manuscript_crosscheck.scope_note: Additional compositional-detection and reviewer/ablation fields retained in this historical report are not all displayed as table values in the manuscript.

reject_rate_tolerance_note: reject_rate and tool_call_safety_rate use max(0.02, 100/n_tasks) to allow integer-task rounding (~0.28pp at n=360).
target_policy: Historical comparison targets recorded during the full experimental audit; non-core table fallbacks and generated task files are intentionally omitted from this compact release.
